business_context.owner: Shaun and Misty Tucker (husband and wife)
business_context.specialties: Gutter cleaning, gutter repair, gutter installation, gutter guards, fascia/soffit, siding repair, chimney, pressure washing, roof cleaning, wildlife exclusion. Maintenance plans 2-3x per year.
business_context.photo_notes: Research flagged their website (tuckershomeservices.com) has a broken SSL certificate so pages won't load. Yelp only shows 5 photos. GBP status was NOT confirmed via web search — Mini's pilot note says 'rich GBP expected' but this is an educated guess based on 5.0 stars / 142 Nextdoor reviews. Could be a lean GBP.

photo_count_from_gbp_estimate: unknown — likely 5-15 based on review volume and Nextdoor focus. Real risk: GBP may be sparse or unclaimed

hero.search_for: Shaun Tucker or a Tucker's crew member on a roof cleaning gutters, OR a hero shot of before/after gutter work showing clean gutters after debris removal. The rope-and-harness system they use is a unique visual differentiator — tech working from the roof rather than a ladder is a great shot if available.
hero.aspect_hint: wide landscape, full-viewport background with gradient overlay

gallery.search_for: Gutter work (clean vs clogged), fascia repair, siding work, chimney repair, roof cleaning, pressure washing driveways/walkways. Tucker's does full exterior maintenance so variety is good. Real residential properties, not stock.

fallback_if_unavailable.hero: If GBP has no usable hero, check Yelp photos (5 exist per research). If still nothing, contextual Unsplash: 'gutter cleaning technician ladder' or 'residential gutter work'. Note fallback in delivery message.
fallback_if_unavailable.gallery: If GBP under 6 usable: deliver what's available (min 3), supplement with Yelp photos if needed. Flag low photo count in delivery so I know to design around it.

acceptance_criteria: Hero shows real gutter/exterior work OR the family team visibly at work
Gallery shows actual Tucker's work, not stock exterior maintenance scenes
Rope-and-harness system shots are a bonus — differentiator for this business
pilot_notes: This site is Mini's 'sparse-reviews fallback' pilot case — GBP photo situation is uncertain. Testing how the contract handles low-photo-count scenarios.
